categories: Snacks,Sweet snacks,Cocoa and its products,Chocolates,Milk chocolates
creator: moon-rabbit
ingredients_text: Milk chocolate 34% (99%) (sugar, cocoa butter, whole milk powder, cocoa mass, emulsifier: soy lecithin, aroma), freeze-dried raspberries (0.9%). May contain eggs, sesame, peanuts and other nuts.
ingredients_text_en: Milk chocolate 34% (99%) (sugar, cocoa butter, whole milk powder, cocoa mass, emulsifier: soy lecithin, aroma), freeze-dried raspberries (0.9%). May contain eggs, sesame, peanuts and other nuts.
ingredients_text_pl: Czekolada mleczna 34% (99%) (cukier, tłuszcz kakaowy, mleko pełne w proszku,miazga kakaowa, emulgator: lecytyna sojowa, aromat), maliny liofilizowane (0,9%). Może zawierać jaja, sezam, orzeszki arachidowe inne orzechy. Przechowywać w suchym i chłodnym miejscu.
ingredients_text_with_allergens: Milk chocolate 34% (99%) (sugar, cocoa butter, whole milk powder, cocoa mass, emulsifier: soy lecithin, aroma), freeze-dried raspberries (0.9%). May contain eggs, sesame, peanuts and other nuts.
